This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Can set 'text-autospace' to the 'ideograph-alpha' keyword: ideograph-alpha
  Failed to execute 'set' on 'StylePropertyMap': Invalid type for property
[FAIL] Can set 'text-autospace' to the 'ideograph-numeric' keyword: ideograph-numeric
  Failed to execute 'set' on 'StylePropertyMap': Invalid type for property
[FAIL] Can set 'text-autospace' to the 'insert' keyword: insert
  Failed to execute 'set' on 'StylePropertyMap': Invalid type for property
[FAIL] Can set 'text-autospace' to the 'auto' keyword: auto
  Failed to execute 'set' on 'StylePropertyMap': Invalid type for property
[FAIL] 'text-autospace' does not support 'ideograph-alpha ideograph-numeric'
  assert_class_string: Unsupported value must be a CSSStyleValue and not one of its subclasses expected "[object CSSStyleValue]" but got "[object Undefined]"
[FAIL] 'text-autospace' does not support 'ideograph-alpha insert'
  assert_class_string: Unsupported value must be a CSSStyleValue and not one of its subclasses expected "[object CSSStyleValue]" but got "[object Undefined]"
[FAIL] 'text-autospace' does not support 'ideograph-numeric insert'
  assert_class_string: Unsupported value must be a CSSStyleValue and not one of its subclasses expected "[object CSSStyleValue]" but got "[object Undefined]"
[FAIL] 'text-autospace' does not support 'ideograph-alpha ideograph-numeric insert'
  assert_class_string: Unsupported value must be a CSSStyleValue and not one of its subclasses expected "[object CSSStyleValue]" but got "[object Undefined]"
